name: Clam and Olive Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can Chopped or minced clams, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the can of black olives and taste a small amount to ensure quality.
2. Chop the remaining olives into desired size pieces.
3. Add the chopped olives to a bowl containing the rest of the ingredients: sour cream, salt, powdered garlic, and cayenne pepper.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to meld.
Quantities for spices are left to personal preference.
Note: If you enjoy cream cheese and chopped olive sandwiches, soften a package of cream cheese, add the chopped olives from this recipe along with a teaspoon or so of lemon juice, and stir well. For added protein, gutsy eaters may include turkey slices.
